analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet praises former EU Directors-General, endorsing a quoted statement as "Absolutely right. Calm and strong. A lesson." It conveys approval of EU leadership qualities but provides no substantive claims about EU performance, unity, citizen benefits, global role, or policies. Evaluation per narrative: EU1 (EU successful story) – Not sufficiently supported; while it lauds DGs, it doesn't assert EU historical success or overcoming challenges. EU2 (EU united) – No mention of unity or solidarity. EU3 (EU useful for citizens) – No policy outcomes or citizen benefits referenced. EU4 (EU avant-garde) – No pioneering actions or regulations mentioned. EU5 (EU champion of fair causes) – No references to democracy/human rights leadership. EU6 (EU contributes to a better world) – No claim about global contributions. Conclusion: No listed narratives are clearly promoted.
